records.question: Which cities where city is Shanghai have temperatures exactly 18.3 in March, exactly 19.4 in November, at least 20.6 in July and September, and at most 20.6 in August and at most 18.3 in December?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT city.city_id FROM city
JOIN temperature ON city.city_id = temperature.city_id
WHERE temperature.sep >= 20.6 AND temperature.jul >= 20.6 AND temperature.mar = 18.3 AND temperature.nov = 19.4 AND city.city = 'Shanghai' AND temperature.dec <= 18.3 AND temperature.aug <= 20.6
records.pred_sql: select city.city_id from city join temperature on city.city_id = temperature.city_id where lower(city.city) like '%shanghai%' and temperature.mar = 18.3 and temperature.nov = 19.4 and temperature.jul >= 20.6 and temperature.sep >= 20.6 and temperature.aug <= 20.6 and temperature.dec <= 18.3 limit 5;
records.thought: We need to filter cities named Shanghai and join with temperature to apply the specified temperature conditions for March, November, July, September, August, and December.

records.question: What cities where hanyu_pinyin is Jīnhuá have January temperatures at most 26.7, March temperatures exactly 27.8, and October temperatures at most 30.6?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT city.city_id FROM city
JOIN temperature ON city.city_id = temperature.city_id
WHERE temperature.jan <= 26.7 AND temperature.mar = 27.8 AND city.hanyu_pinyin = 'Jīnhuá' AND temperature.oct <= 30.6
records.pred_sql: select city.city_id from city join temperature on city.city_id = temperature.city_id where lower(city.hanyu_pinyin) = 'jīnhuá' and temperature.jan <= 26.7 and temperature.mar = 27.8 and temperature.oct <= 30.6 limit 5;
records.thought: We need to filter cities where hanyu_pinyin is 'Jīnhuá' and join with temperature to apply the conditions on January, March, and October temperatures.

records.question: Which cities are exactly named Ningbo ( Zhejiang )?

records.question: Which city has the name Suzhou ( Jiangsu ) with hanzi 苏州/ 蘇州, a regional population of at least 10465994, a GDP exactly 1071.7, and hanyu_pinyin exactly Sūzhōu?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT city.city_id FROM city
WHERE city.city = 'Suzhou ( Jiangsu )' AND city.hanzi = '苏州/ 蘇州' AND city.regional_population >= 10465994 AND city.gdp = 1071.7 AND city.hanyu_pinyin = 'Sūzhōu'
records.pred_sql: select city.city_id from city where city.city = 'Suzhou ( Jiangsu )' and city.hanzi = '苏州/ 蘇州' and city.regional_population >= 10465994 and city.gdp = 1071.7 and city.hanyu_pinyin = 'Sūzhōu' limit 5;
records.thought: We need to filter the city table for the exact city name, hanzi, regional population, GDP, and hanyu_pinyin as specified, and select city_id with a limit of 5.

records.question: Where is the city Yangzhou ( Jiangsu ) whose hanzi is 扬州/ 揚州, with a GDP exactly 263.03 and a regional population at most 4459760?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT city.city_id FROM city
WHERE city.gdp = 263.03 AND city.regional_population <= 4459760 AND city.hanzi = '扬州/ 揚州' AND city.city = 'Yangzhou ( Jiangsu )'
records.pred_sql: select city.city_id from city where lower(city) like '%yangzhou ( jiangsu )%' and (hanzi like '%扬州%' or hanzi like '%揚州%') and gdp = 263.03 and regional_population <= 4459760 limit 5;
records.thought: We need to filter the city table for the city named 'Yangzhou ( Jiangsu )', hanzi containing '扬州' or '揚州', GDP exactly 263.03, and regional population at most 4459760.

records.question: Which cities have a GDP of at least 408.02 and average temperatures of at least 18.9 in February, at least 19.4 in March, but no more than 22.8 in October?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT city.city_id FROM city
JOIN temperature ON city.city_id = temperature.city_id
WHERE temperature.feb >= 18.9 AND temperature.oct <= 22.8 AND temperature.mar >= 19.4 AND city.gdp >= 408.02
records.pred_sql: select city.city_id from city join temperature on city.city_id = temperature.city_id where city.gdp >= 408.02 and temperature.feb >= 18.9 and temperature.mar >= 19.4 and temperature.oct <= 22.8 limit 5;
records.thought: We need to join city and temperature on city_id, then filter for cities with GDP >= 408.02, February temperature >= 18.9, March temperature >= 19.4, and October temperature <= 22.8.

records.question: Which cities have a GDP of at least 266.81 and where the hanzi is 嘉兴/ 嘉興?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT city.city_id FROM city
WHERE city.gdp >= 266.81 AND city.hanzi = '嘉兴/ 嘉興'
records.pred_sql: select city.city_id from city where gdp >= 266.81 and (lower(hanzi) like '%嘉兴%' or lower(hanzi) like '%嘉興%') limit 5;
records.thought: We need to filter cities where GDP is at least 266.81 and the Hanzi field contains either '嘉兴' or '嘉興', using like for both variants.

records.question: Which cities where hanzi is 南京 and hanyu_pinyin is Nánjīng have a GDP of at most 614.55 and temperatures with January at least 26.1, March and April at most 26.1, and October at most 28.3?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT city.city_id FROM city
JOIN temperature ON city.city_id = temperature.city_id
WHERE temperature.mar <= 26.1 AND temperature.jan >= 26.1 AND temperature.apr <= 26.1 AND city.hanyu_pinyin = 'Nánjīng' AND temperature.oct <= 28.3 AND city.hanzi = '南京' AND city.gdp <= 614.55
records.pred_sql: select city.city_id from city join temperature on city.city_id = temperature.city_id where lower(city.hanzi) = '南京' and lower(city.hanyu_pinyin) = 'nánjīng' and city.gdp <= 614.55 and temperature.jan >= 26.1 and temperature.mar <= 26.1 and temperature.apr <= 26.1 and temperature.oct <= 28.3 limit 5;
records.thought: We need to filter cities where hanzi is '南京', hanyu_pinyin is 'Nánjīng', GDP is at most 614.55, and join with temperature to apply the temperature constraints for January, March, April, and October.
